notes: Starter overlay. Will be overwritten by scripts/update_pitch_matchups.py. pitchers[id].arsenal holds usage fractions (sum ~1.0) for each pitch type. hitters[id].xSlgByPitch and teams[id].xSlgByPitch hold expected SLG against each pitch type. baseline.xSlgByPitch is the league average for each code. Pitch type codes: FF 4-seam, SI sinker, FC cutter, SL slider, ST sweeper, CU curve, KC knuckle curve, CH changeup, FS splitter.
